description_long: This is a futuristic, rectangular toolbox with a black exterior and prominent purple accents along its edges. The lid is hinged and features a large, blue-tinted transparent window, allowing visibility into the interior. The front panel displays a digital screen with alphanumeric text and a barcode, flanked by four red circular elements that may serve as lights or indicators. The interior is organized with a blue transparent tray, marked with white caution symbols and compartments for tools or components. The sides of the box have recessed handles for carrying, and the overall design suggests a high-tech, secure storage solution. The materials appear to be a combination of reinforced plastic or composite, transparent acrylic, and electronic display components.
description: A high-tech, black and purple toolbox with a transparent blue lid, digital display, and organized interior tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, digital display, barcode, and interior tray with compartments.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the recessed handle and the thickness of the transparent lid.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the solid back panel with a blue window and purple trim, and no display.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a clear view of the handle and interior tray.
attribute_handle_type: Recessed rectangular handles on both sides, made of reinforced plastic, fixed and integrated into the body for ergonomic grip.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Implied electronic or snap latch mechanism integrated into the front panel, likely plastic with no visible keyhole or padlock compatibility.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single main compartment with a removable or fixed blue transparent tray, subdivided into several small sections for tool organization.
attribute_external_labeling: Front digital display: 'QWEQOOO', barcode, and additional alphanumeric text
Rear panel: Japanese cautionary text and number '-23098-'
